violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee putting on gloves without washing his hands. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Rice was found stored in an uncovered bin next to the walk-in cooler. Food items should be protected from contamination.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The inside of the refrigerated prep table and the outside of the 3 compartment storage bin next to it were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed using same pair of single-use gloves for more than one task. Observed food employee use gloved hands to operate the register and then she helped a customer at the hot case and did not change her gloves. Gloves should be changed between tasks.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Sushi 3 compartment storage bin, tops, and the counter under the sushi roller were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk-in cooler floor was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
